mapper.sql: id, user_id, title, summary, is_starred, pinned, sort_order, deleted, delete_time, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: insert into note (id, user_id, title, summary, is_starred, pinned, sort_order, deleted, delete_time, create_time, update_time, content) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{summary,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isStarred,jdbcType=BIT}, #{pinned,jdbcType=BIT}, #{sortOrder,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{deleted,jdbcType=BIT}, #{deleteTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR})

insert into note
id,
user_id,
title,
summary,
is_starred,
pinned,
sort_order,
deleted,
delete_time,
create_time,
update_time,
content,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{summary,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{isStarred,jdbcType=BIT},
#{pinned,jdbcType=BIT},
#{sortOrder,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{deleted,jdbcType=BIT},
#{deleteTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update note
user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
summary = #{summary,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
is_starred = #{isStarred,jdbcType=BIT},
pinned = #{pinned,jdbcType=BIT},
sort_order = #{sortOrder,jdbcType=INTEGER},
deleted = #{deleted,jdbcType=BIT},
delete_time = #{deleteTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
content = #{content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update note set user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, summary = #{summary,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, is_starred = #{isStarred,jdbcType=BIT}, pinned = #{pinned,jdbcType=BIT}, sort_order = #{sortOrder,jdbcType=INTEGER}, deleted = #{deleted,jdbcType=BIT}, delete_time = #{deleteTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, content = #{content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update note set user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, summary = #{summary,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, is_starred = #{isStarred,jdbcType=BIT}, pinned = #{pinned,jdbcType=BIT}, sort_order = #{sortOrder,jdbcType=INTEGER}, deleted = #{deleted,jdbcType=BIT}, delete_time = #{deleteTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select c.category_name as categoryName, count(ncr.note_id) as noteCount from category c left join note_category_relation ncr on c.id = ncr.category_id left join note n on ncr.note_id = n.id and n.deleted = 0 and n.user_id = #{userId} where c.user_id = #{userId} and c.deleted = 0 group by c.id, c.category_name
select from note where deleted = 1 and delete_time < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY)

select a.name as userName, a.user_code as userCode, count(n.id) as noteCount from admin a left join note n on n.user_id = a.id and n.deleted = 0 where a.user_code != 'root' group by a.id, a.name, a.user_code order by noteCount desc limit #{topN,jdbcType=INTEGER}
select count(*) from note n where n.deleted = 1 and exists (select 1 from admin a where a.id = n.user_id)
select count(*) from note n where n.deleted = 0 and exists (select 1 from admin a where a.id = n.user_id)
select coalesce(max(sort_order), -1) from note where user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and deleted = 0
select id from note where user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and deleted = 0
